_comment: omarchy-super-power-saver: battery-oriented Firefox defaults. Installed to /etc/firefox/policies/policies.json by the setup script (only if none exists). Status:'default' = sets the DEFAULT branch each startup: survives updates, applies to all profiles, and any user about:config change still wins. VAAPI hw video decode needs NO prefs in Firefox >= 137 (on by default; media.ffmpeg.vaapi.enabled no longer exists).

browser.sessionstore.interval._comment: session-restore disk write every 15s -> 60s: quarters constant disk/CPU wakeups; costs <=60s of tab state on a hard crash

network.captive-portal-service.enabled._comment: periodic HTTP probes off; portal pages on hotel wifi need manual visit to neverssl.com
